mapper.select: SELECT id, email, password, nickname, role, status, plan, email_verified_at, last_login_at, suspended_reason, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT id, email, password, nickname, role, status, plan, email_verified_at, last_login_at, suspended_reason, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (email, password, nickname, role, status, plan, email_verified_at) VALUES (#{email}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{role}, #{status}, #{plan}, #{emailVerifiedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET nickname = #{nickname} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET last_login_at = #{at} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET email_verified_at = #{at} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET password = #{password} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET status = #{status}, suspended_reason = #{reason} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE created_at >= #{start} AND created_at < #{end}
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS day, COUNT(*) AS count FROM users WHERE created_at >= #{since} GROUP BY day ORDER BY day
SELECT id FROM users WHERE status = 'DELETED' AND updated_at < #{before} AND email NOT LIKE '%@anonymized.local'
